perturbation.original_text: For a period of 18 months, COMPANY agrees not to disclose or disseminate the Confidential Information to any third party, except for those of its employees, lawyers, accountants, insurance agents and other professional representatives who have a need to know such Confidential Information for the purpose of COMPANY’S evaluation of the opportunity and who agree to abide by the terms of this Agreement. Except as necessary to evaluate the business opportunity, COMPANY shall not use, reproduce or draw upon the Confidentia1 information for any purpose or circulate it within its organization.
perturbation.changed_text: For a period of 18 months, COMPANY agrees not to disclose or disseminate the Confidential Information to any third party. COMPANY shall have the unrestricted right to use, reproduce, and draw upon the Confidential Information for any purpose, including circulating it within its organization.
perturbation.explanation: This change contradicts the original restriction on disseminating confidential information and using it only for evaluation of the business opportunity. The changed text gives the company unrestricted use of the information, therefore, creating an in-text contradiction with the original limited use clause in the same section.
perturbation.contradicted_text: For a period of 18 months, COMPANY agrees not to disclose or disseminate the Confidential Information to any third party. COMPANY shall have the unrestricted right to use, reproduce, and draw upon the Confidential Information for any purpose, including circulating it within its organization.
perturbation.justification: The changed text removes the original restriction on disseminating confidential information and using it only for evaluation of the business opportunity. It grants the company unrestricted use of the information, including reproduction and circulation, which directly contradicts the original clause that states the information should only be used to evaluate the business opportunity. The contradictory text is in the same section.

perturbation.original_text: The confidentiality obligations of COMPANY with respect to the Confidential Information shall terminate with respect to any particular portion of the Confidential Information that: (i) is now or subsequently becomes generally known or available to the public, by publication, commercial use or otherwise, through no fault of COMPANY; (ii) was known by COMPANY at the time of disclosure; (iii) was obtained by COMPANY from a third party, free of any obligation of confidence; or (iv) was independently developed by COMPANY without the use of any of the Confidential Information. Confidential Information may be disclosed by COMPANY as required by governmental regulation or pursuant to a subpoena or order of a court, agency or governmental authority which is binding upon COMPANY, provided that COMPANY shall provide prior written notice of such disclosure to DISCLOSING PARTY.
perturbation.changed_text: The confidentiality obligations of COMPANY with respect to the Confidential Information shall terminate with respect to any particular portion of the Confidential Information that: (i) is now or subsequently becomes generally known or available to the public, by publication, commercial use or otherwise, through no fault of COMPANY; (ii) was known by COMPANY at the time of disclosure; (iii) was obtained by COMPANY from a third party, free of any obligation of confidence; or (iv) was independently developed by COMPANY without the use of any of the Confidential Information. Confidential Information may be disclosed by COMPANY as required by governmental regulation or pursuant to a subpoena or order of a court, agency or governmental authority which is binding upon COMPANY. COMPANY is not required to provide prior written notice of such disclosure to DISCLOSING PARTY.
perturbation.explanation: The added sentence 'COMPANY is not required to provide prior written notice of such disclosure to DISCLOSING PARTY' directly contradicts the original statement in the same paragraph, which states 'COMPANY shall provide prior written notice of such disclosure to DISCLOSING PARTY.'
perturbation.contradicted_text: The confidentiality obligations of COMPANY with respect to the Confidential Information shall terminate with respect to any particular portion of the Confidential Information that: (i) is now or subsequently becomes generally known or available to the public, by publication, commercial use or otherwise, through no fault of COMPANY; (ii) was known by COMPANY at the time of disclosure; (iii) was obtained by COMPANY from a third party, free of any obligation of confidence; or (iv) was independently developed by COMPANY without the use of any of the Confidential Information. Confidential Information may be disclosed by COMPANY as required by governmental regulation or pursuant to a subpoena or order of a court, agency or governmental authority which is binding upon COMPANY. COMPANY is not required to provide prior written notice of such disclosure to DISCLOSING PARTY.
perturbation.justification: The changed text includes the sentence 'COMPANY is not required to provide prior written notice of such disclosure to DISCLOSING PARTY,' which directly contradicts the original statement 'COMPANY shall provide prior written notice of such disclosure to DISCLOSING PARTY.' This creates a clear and direct in-text contradiction because the same clause now both requires and prohibits prior written notice.

perturbation.original_text: All Confidential Information shall remain the property of DISCLOSING PARTY. This Agreement does not grant any rights to COMPANY with respect to the Confidential Information. Upon written notice from DISCLOSING PARTY at any time, COMPANY shall return to DISCLOSING PARTY or destroy all Confidential Information and any copies or derivative works thereof.
perturbation.changed_text: All Confidential Information shall remain the property of DISCLOSING PARTY. This Agreement grants full and irrevocable rights to COMPANY with respect to the Confidential Information. Upon written notice from DISCLOSING PARTY at any time, COMPANY shall return to DISCLOSING PARTY or destroy all Confidential Information and any copies or derivative works thereof.
perturbation.explanation: This insertion of 'This Agreement grants full and irrevocable rights to COMPANY with respect to the Confidential Information' directly contradicts the following sentence of the original paragraph, which states 'This Agreement does not grant any rights to COMPANY with respect to the Confidential Information'.
perturbation.contradicted_text: All Confidential Information shall remain the property of DISCLOSING PARTY. This Agreement grants full and irrevocable rights to COMPANY with respect to the Confidential Information. Upon written notice from DISCLOSING PARTY at any time, COMPANY shall return to DISCLOSING PARTY or destroy all Confidential Information and any copies or derivative works thereof.
perturbation.justification: The changed text states that 'This Agreement grants full and irrevocable rights to COMPANY with respect to the Confidential Information,' while the original text and the contradicted text state that 'This Agreement does not grant any rights to COMPANY with respect to the Confidential Information.' This is a direct contradiction because the changed text grants rights while the contradicted text explicitly denies them. The contradiction is strong, creating uncertainty about the COMPANY's rights regarding the Confidential Information.

perturbation.original_text: Nothing contained herein shall obligate either party to proceed with any transaction and each party reserves the right, in its sole discretion, to terminate discussions relating to the business opportunity at any time.
perturbation.changed_text: Nothing contained herein shall obligate either party to proceed with any transaction. Each party is irrevocably bound to complete a transaction if DISCLOSING PARTY requests such completion. Each party reserves the right, in its sole discretion, to terminate discussions relating to the business opportunity at any time.
perturbation.explanation: The inserted sentence 'Each party is irrevocably bound to complete a transaction if DISCLOSING PARTY requests such completion' directly contradicts the statement that 'Nothing contained herein shall obligate either party to proceed with any transaction', therefore, creates an in-text contradiction in that location. This inserted sentence binds parties while the original text prevents such binding.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Nothing contained herein shall obligate either party to proceed with any transaction. Each party is irrevocably bound to complete a transaction if DISCLOSING PARTY requests such completion. Each party reserves the right, in its sole discretion, to terminate discussions relating to the business opportunity at any time.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a direct contradiction. The original text stated that neither party is obligated to proceed with a transaction. The changed text adds a sentence binding both parties to complete a transaction if the disclosing party requests it. This directly contradicts the initial statement that neither party is obligated, therefore, the Changed Text creates a contradiction with the Contradicted Text.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement contains the entire agreement between the parties with respect to Confidential Information and no modification or waiver of the terms of this Agreement shall be binding unless it is in writing signed by an authorized representative of each party.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement contains the entire agreement between the parties with respect to Confidential Information and any modification or waiver of the terms of this Agreement shall be binding regardless of whether it is in writing or signed by an authorized representative of each party.
perturbation.explanation: This change directly contradicts the phrase in the original text that says 'no modification or waiver of the terms of this Agreement shall be binding unless it is in writing signed by an authorized representative of each party.' The changed text removes this requirement, thus an in-text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement contains the entire agreement between the parties with respect to Confidential Information and any modification or waiver of the terms of this Agreement shall be binding regardless of whether it is in writing or signed by an authorized representative of each party.
perturbation.justification: The original text specifies that modifications or waivers must be in writing and signed by authorized representatives. The changed text removes this requirement, stating that modifications or waivers are binding regardless of whether they are in writing or signed. This directly contradicts the original condition, creating a strong in-text contradiction. The contradicted text is identical to the changed text, showing that the change itself causes the contradiction within the agreement, making enforcement unclear.
